# FSM: Contratos de Actions y Eventos

## ActionResult canonico

```ts
type ActionResult<TEvent> =
  | { ok: true; emit: TEvent }
  | { ok: false; emit: TEvent };
```

## FSM Importacion: actions

1. `loadFileAction(input: { file: File }): ActionResult<"FILE_LOADED" | "PARSE_FAIL">`
2. `parseSvgAction(input: { svgContent: string }): ActionResult<"PARSE_OK" | "PARSE_FAIL">`
3. `mapTemplateAction(input: { parsed: unknown }): ActionResult<"MAP_OK" | "MAP_FAIL">`
4. `validateBatchAction(input: { batch: ImportedGlyphBatch }): ActionResult<"VALIDATION_OK" | "VALIDATION_FAIL">`
5. `applyBatchAction(input: { projectId: string; batch: ImportedGlyphBatch }): ActionResult<"APPLY_OK" | "APPLY_FAIL">`

## FSM Exportacion: actions

1. `validateReadinessAction(input: { projectId: string }): ActionResult<"VALID_OK" | "VALID_FAIL">`
2. `exportTtfAction(input: { projectId: string }): ActionResult<"EXPORT_OK" | "EXPORT_FAIL">`
3. `saveFileAction(input: { filename: string; bytes: Uint8Array }): ActionResult<"SAVE_OK" | "SAVE_FAIL">`

## Reglas de error y evento

1. Toda action captura excepciones y emite evento `*_FAIL`.
2. Ninguna action cambia estado global directamente.
3. El estado solo cambia por tabla de transiciones FSM.
